author: śrīmadbhaktideśika ācārya mahārāja
verses:
śrī⋅gaura⋅dhāmāśrita⋅śuddhabhaktaṁ
rūpānugādyaṁ niravadyarūpam
vairāgya⋅dharmojjvala⋅vigrahaṁ taṁ
vande prabhuṁ gaura-kiśora-saṁjñam

asat⋅prasaṅgaṁ parihāya nityaṁ
gaurāṅga⋅sevā⋅vrata⋅magnacittam
gauḍa⋅vrajābheda⋅viśiṣṭa⋅prajñaṁ
vande prabhuṁ gaura⋅kiśora⋅saṁjñam

śrīdhāma⋅māyāpura⋅divya⋅gūḍha⋅
māhātmya⋅gītonmukharaṁ vareṇyam
dhanyaṁ mahā-bhāgavatāgragaṇyaṁ
vande prabhuṁ gaura⋅kiśora⋅saṁjñam

pūtāvadhūta⋅vraja⋅śīrṣaratnaṁ
śrī⋅rādhikā⋅kṛṣṇa⋅nigūḍha⋅bhaktam
sadā vrajāveśa⋅sarāga⋅ceṣṭaṁ
vande prabhuṁ gaura⋅kiśora⋅saṁjñam

śokāspadātīta⋅prabhāva⋅ramyaṁ
mūḍhairavedyaṁ praṇatābhigamyam
nityānubhūtācyuta⋅sadvilāsaṁ
vande prabhuṁ gaura⋅kiśora⋅saṁjñam

kāpaṭya⋅dharmānvita⋅caṇḍa⋅daṇḍa⋅
vidhāyakaṁ sajjana⋅saṅga⋅raṅgam
śrī⋅kṛṣṇa⋅caitanya⋅padābja⋅bhṛṅgaṁ
vande prabhuṁ gaura⋅kiśora⋅saṁjñam

dāmodarotthāna⋅dine pradhāne
kṣetre pavitre kuliyābhidhāne
prapañca⋅līlā⋅parihāravantaṁ
vande prabhuṁ gaura⋅kiśora⋅saṁjñam

tava hi ‘dayita⋅dāse’ satya⋅sūrya⋅prakāśe
jagati durita⋅nāśe prodyate cidvilāse
vayama-nugata-bhṛtyāḥ pāda-padmaṁ prapannā
anudinamanukampāṁ prārthayāmo nagaṇyāḥ
en_translation:
I worship Śrīla Gaurakiśora dāsa Bābājī Mahārāja, the pure devotee sheltered in Śrī Gauradhāma. He is the foremost follower of Śrīla Rūpa Gosvāmī, his form is faultless, and he shines with the brilliance of intense renunciation.

I worship Śrīla Gaurakiśora dāsa Bābājī Mahārāja, who always rejects bad association and whose mind is immersed in the vow of serving Lord Gaurāṅga. He possesses the unique wisdom of seeing the non-difference between Gauḍa and Vraja.

I worship Śrīla Gaurakiśora dāsa Bābājī Mahārāja. He eloquently sings the divine, hidden glories of Śrīdhāma Māyāpura. He is the worshipable, blessed, and foremost among the great Mahā-bhāgavatas.

I worship Śrīla Gaurakiśora dāsa Bābājī Mahārāja, the crest jewel of the pure avadhūtas. He is a confidential devotee of Śrī Śrī Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa, always absorbed in the mood of Vraja with deep attachment.

I worship Śrīla Gaurakiśora dāsa Bābājī Mahārāja. He is charming, residing in a realm beyond lamentation. Unknowable to fools but approachable by the humble, he eternally experiences the divine pastimes of the Infallible Lord.

I worship Śrīla Gaurakiśora dāsa Bābājī Mahārāja. He wields a fierce staff to punish deceitful dharma, yet he delights in the association of the saintly. He is a honeybee at the lotus feet of Śrī Kṛṣṇa Caitanya.

I worship Śrīla Gaurakiśora dāsa Bābājī Mahārāja, who concluded his earthly pastimes on the holy day of Utthāna Ekādaśī in the sacred place of Kuliyā.

O Dayita Dāsa! You are the shining sun of truth, destroying sins in this world and revealing spiritual pastimes. We, your insignificant servants, have surrendered to your lotus feet and pray for your causeless mercy day after day.
